product_title: Zinus 6 Inch Twin Green Tea Memory Foam Mattress [New Version], Fiberglass Free, Medium Firm Feel, Zoned Pressure Relief, Certified Safe Foams & Fabric, Mattress in A Box
high_level_description: Twin-size 6-inch memory foam mattress designed for pressure relief and comfortable support. It is fiberglass-free, infused with green tea and charcoal to help keep it fresh, and uses CertiPUR-US certified foam with an OEKO-TEX certified cover; ships compressed in a box.

attributes.material: High Density Foam, Memory Foam (polyester cover)
special_features: Green tea and purified charcoal infusions

best_image.reasoning: Chose the first image as the likely hero shot showing the mattress fully and unobstructed. Other images appear to include lifestyle elements (pillows/blankets/people), packaging, or close-up/cutaway views. A measurement overlay (if present) is acceptable but still secondary to a clean, full-object hero.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81iq.notes: Full mattress view with no objects covering it; centered/front-facing hero.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51tS.notes: Packaging/rolled presentation likely obscures the mattress in its in-use form.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81Re.notes: Lifestyle setup with pillows/blanket partially covering the mattress surface.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81At.notes: Cutaway/layer or close-up view; minimal obstruction but not a full unobstructed product view.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81hZ.notes: Likely lifestyle with a person or heavy bedding obscuring the mattress.

https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71Z-.notes: Unobstructed mattress with possible measurement overlay only (allowed). Tie broken in favor of the hero image for centering/full-object presentation.
